bme68x_init.message0: Initialize BME68x environmental sensor I2C address %1
bme68x_init.tooltip: Initialize BME680/BME688 environment sensor (temperature/pressure/humidity/gas), using I2C interface

bme68x_read_temperature.tooltip: Read the temperature value of the BME68x sensor (Celsius)

bme68x_read_humidity.tooltip: Reading the relative humidity value (percent) of the BME68x sensor

bme68x_read_pressure.tooltip: Read the atmospheric pressure value (hPa) of the BME68x sensor

bme68x_read_gas.tooltip: Read the gas resistance value (ohms) of the BME68x sensor, which can be used for air quality assessment

bme68x_update.tooltip: Trigger a sensor data read and update all values
